title: Unfortunate Development (Discontinued)
description:
In the quiet stillness of the forest, an eerie groaning echoes through the trees. From the depths of the dark, a scrapped accidental creation.

Unfortunate Developement
body:
In the quiet stillness of the forest, an eerie groaning echoes through the trees. From the depths of the dark, a scrapped accidental creation.

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/191367c84d55f81830cc08777b3cd78d06d45dfc.png)

This mod is incompatible with the Creation mod by [Flamc04](https://www.curseforge.com/members/flamc04/projects). That is because I used that mod as a base. So the mod appears as "creation" and the entity's ID is "creation:creation", but it appears as "Unfortunate Developement" in game.
Most things are configurable. To configure the mod, you can use [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) and [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue) mods.
PS: The higher the timers' value, the lower the rate of Unfortunate Development spawning.

This is a dweller copy made just to showcase the concept. 
I want to state that I am ashamed of making this a dweller copy.

Have fun! 

**_The assets of this mod by Arcle are all licensed under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0_**
